description: Phishing templates targeting financial transactions and banking

templates.name: Federal Reserve Wire Transfer Alert
suggested_subject_lines: URGENT: Wire transfer requires immediate authorization
Action Required: Outbound wire transfer pending approval
templates.notes: Best for finance, accounting, and executive staff. Advanced difficulty — lower click rate but high-value target for BEC scenarios.

templates.name: Skype Credit/Payment Notice
suggested_subject_lines: Skype: Payment required to continue service
Your Skype subscription is expiring — update payment
templates.notes: Niche lure best suited to organizations still using Skype or Skype for Business. The expiring-subscription pretext applies moderate pressure. Consider a Teams-based template instead in fully migrated Microsoft 365 environments.
